title: Categories
instruction_1: In this section you can manage the categories used by your website.
instruction_2: To begin, create (or select) a category.
categories_empty: There are no categories here yet
categories_create_instruction: You can create one by tapping the CREATE button
category_create_no_name_error: The category must have a name
category_delete_question: Do you want to delete this category?
category_delete_method_question: Which deletion method do you prefer?
category_enable_question: Do you want to restore this category?
category_move_question: Are you sure you want to move the category?
couldnt_edit_category: The category could not be edited
couldnt_move_inside_self: You cannot move a category within itself
attributes_instruction_1: In this section you will be able to define what attributes your categories have.
attributes_instruction_2: Attributes are the characteristics that products within a category possess.
attributes_instruction_3: Examples of attributes are: Size (for clothing), Material (for objects), etc.
attributes_instruction_4: Please note that the attributes defined for a category will also be used by its subcategories.
attribute_value_no_repeated: That name already exists for a value in that attribute.
attribute_remove_title: Do you want to delete that attribute?
attribute_remove_message: Once deleted, it cannot be recovered and any records related to this product will be lost.
attribute_disable_message: This will disable the attribute and it will not be visible to the public, but it will be saved in the database.
attribute_enable_message: Users will be able to view it again
attribute_enable_title: Do you want to restore that attribute?
attribute_value_enable_title: Do you want to restore that attribute value?
attribute_value_remove_title: Do you want to delete that attribute value?
attribute_no_repeated: That name already exists for a value in that attribute.
cancel_edition_message: The changes made will not be saved
save_edition_message: All changes made will be applied. If you removed any attributes (or one of their values), this will apply to all your existing products. This is irreversible, so proceed with caution.
